entity.summary: MegaETH-native decentralized exchange and launchpad combining concentrated-liquidity pools, routed token swaps, liquidity provision, and social token-launch surfaces under one trading venue.
entity.notes: HEI consolidates Kumbaya swap, V2 and V3 pool, routing, launchpad, and social-asset product surfaces into one exchange entity. No exact launch date, legal entity, or jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Kumbaya official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application remains reachable and preserves the Kumbaya trading and launchpad identity.

evidence.title: Kumbaya protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Independent metrics report current MegaETH TVL, fees, revenue, and non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day DEX volume, supporting active classification.
